name: Icejade Acti
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアクティ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 WATER monster from your hand to the GY; draw 1 card. If a face-up WATER monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 "Icejade" monster from your hand or GY, except "Icejade Acti". You can only use each effect of "Icejade Acti" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 WATER monster from your hand to the GY; draw 1 card. If a face-up WATER monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 "Icejade" monster from your hand or GY, except "Icejade Acti". You can only use each effect of "Icejade Acti" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 WATER monster from your hand to the GY; draw 1 card. If a face-up WATER monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 "Icejade" monster from your hand or GY, except "Icejade Acti". You can only use each effect of "Icejade Acti" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Activates if destroyed by card effect
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
